objective: Add exact synthetic runtime conformance coverage for the two LSLC-003U-observed mixed-width and exact-127-byte values without changing LSLC-003T production behavior.
outputs: Focused existing-runtime tests for one 9-byte mixed-width UTF-8 value and one exact-127-byte value in finite loopback.
Sanitized conformance fixture/checker bound to LSLC-003U hashes and LSLC-003T capability/framing invariants.
Documentation and sole-policy routing with explicit no-production-change evidence.
non_scope: Production logic, public API, activation, framing, bounds, empty or >127-byte values, multiple channels or records, other length forms, non-loopback networking, devices, dependencies, unsafe/FFI, copied source, or authority.

acceptance.proof: The unchanged capability-gated runtime preserves both LSLC-003U value classes and exact timestamps through finite loopback with cleanup.
Only test code and evidence/routes change; production framing, APIs, activation, dependencies, and authority remain unchanged.
Standard policy, public boundary, instructions, documentation, and workflow contracts pass.

commit_policy: Commit lifecycle separately; source changes are test-module-only; preserve exact production bytes outside the test module.

instruction_surfaces.change_reason: State exact conformance cases and no-production-change boundary.
Route conformance evidence without widening claims.
Bind synthetic runtime coverage to observed cases.
Existing LSL and compatibility boundaries apply.
Existing evidence and closed activation guidance applies.
